name: scs-play
description: SCS Play — 14 game modes, reflexes, brain training, speed

scripts.verify: npm run contrast-audit && npm run build:prod && npm run contrast-audit:dom && npm run smoke-test
scripts.cap:sync: node scripts/build-prod.mjs && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run: node scripts/build-prod.mjs && npx cap run android
